title: CobbleTCG-ResorcePack5
description: ResorucePacks for CobbleTCG with 28 collections and 5700+cards
body:
Resource Pack containing all 28 CobbleTCG collections

![All Collections](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ajEJaCCf/images/96e9841dda1bda30c84d5378de4e9786a88960ff.png)

# Texture Pack for CobbleTCG-1.5.0 includes:

- 2024 Scarlet & Violet Paradox Rift   -  #268Cards
- 2024 Scarlet & Violet Temporal Forces  -  #220Cards
- 2025 Scarlet & Violet Journey Together  -  #191Cards
- 2025 Scarlet & Violet Black Bolt  -  #173Cards
- 2025 Scarlet & Violet White Flare  -  #174Cards
- 2025 Mega Evolution  -  #190Cards

More collections will be added in the future. I haven't decided yet how to expand them—whether I'll add new collections to the existing packs or create a separate pack for each new one.
